Finance Department
Manager: [PERSON]: [SALARY]
Review Period: [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME], 2022

Competency Ratings: 
Technical Skills: 4
Business Acumen: 5
Communication: 3
Teamwork: 4

David has consistently demonstrated strong technical skills, providing accurate and timely financial analysis to support business decisions. His business acumen is exceptional, and he has shown a deep understanding of the company's financial position and industry trends. However, there is room for improvement in his communication skills, as he sometimes struggles to effectively convey complex financial concepts to non-financial stakeholders. Despite this, [PERSON] is a valued member of the finance team and has built strong relationships with his colleagues.

Over the next review period, [PERSON] should focus on developing his communication skills, seeking feedback from colleagues and supervisors on how to improve his presentation style and clarity. Additionally, [PERSON] has opportunities to take on more leadership roles within the team, mentoring junior staff members and contributing to process improvements. With his strong technical skills and business acumen, [PERSON] is well-positioned for future growth and advancement within the company. Overall, [PERSON]'s performance has been strong, and with continued development and focus on areas for improvement, he will be an even more valuable asset to the finance team.
